S2 }} '''[https://www.instagram.com/theesportsclub/ The Esports Club]''' in association with '''[https://www.instagram.com/ultragear_gaming/ LG Ultragear]''' present an Invitational BGMI tournament called the '''''TEC BGMI Invitational Season 1''''' with a prize pool of ₹5,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Mayavi|b1flag=in |b1name=Shubham Chawla |b2=Spero|b2name=Piyush Bathla|b2flag=in |b3=Fritzz }} ===Format=== '''''BGMI Invitational Season 1:''' 21st August 2021 to 24th August 2021.'' * ''20 Teams '' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and [[Miramar]]'' * ''20 Matches to be played over a period of 4 days.'' * ''5 Matches to be played each day.'' ====Matchdays==== * ''4 Matchdays: 5 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''21st August''''': ''(E>>M>>E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''22nd August''''': ''(M>>E>>M>>E>>M)'' ** '''''28th August''''': ''(E>>M>>E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''29th August''''': ''(M>>E>>M>>E>>M)'' ====Points Distribution==== {{MatchScoringPointsTable|showtiebreaker=false|killterm=finish |{{Json|place=1|points=15|place2=6 |points2=4}} |{{Json|place=2|points=12|place2=7 |points2=2}} |{{Json|place=3|points=10|place2=8-12 |points2=1}} |{{Json|place=4|points=8 |place2=13-20|points2=0}} |{{Json|place=5|points=6 }} }} ==Prize Pool== ₹5,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $6735 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
